title: ECB Signals Rate Cuts Amid Economic Slowdown
summary: The European Central Bank indicated potential rate cuts as inflation pressures ease and economic growth slows across the eurozone.

title: German Manufacturing Crisis Deepens
summary: German industrial production fell sharply, raising concerns about recession risks in Europe's largest economy.

title: France Announces New Green Energy Investment Plan
summary: The French government unveiled a €50 billion green energy investment plan to boost renewable energy and create jobs.
